title: Creamy Vegan Pasta Primavera
description: A colorful and delicious vegan pasta dish loaded with sautéed vegetables, creamy sauce, and served with a side of garlic bread.
instructions: Cook pasta according to package instructions and set aside.
In a large skillet, melt vegan butter over medium heat. Add garlic and sauté for 1 minute.
Add onion, mushrooms, bell peppers, and zucchini to the skillet. Cook until the vegetables are tender, about 5-7 minutes.
Stir in vegan cream cheese until melted and smooth.
Add cooked pasta to the skillet and toss with the creamy sauce.
Season with salt, pepper, and nutritional yeast (if using).
Optional: Serve with a side of garlic bread for a complete meal.
